name: Asian Black Bean Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp fermented black beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok or heavy skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the oil, black beans, and garlic to the pan.
3. Stir-fry for about 12 seconds.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (chicken broth, soy sauce, rice wine, sugar, cornstarch) to the pan.
5. Continue stir-frying for about 1 minute or until the sauce thickens.
Makes about 3/4 cup sauce.
